testcase.name: test_office_report_inactive_without_exit_date_still_counted
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_historical_employee_counts.py:92: in test_office_report_inactive_without_exit_date_still_counted assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Office Location 'HistCount-Test-Office' already exists"} E assert 409 == 200 E + where 409 = <Response [409 Conflict]>.status_code
